title: Question about Asuka and Shinji
wikitext:
[]: Question about Asuka and Shinji             Quote Post by bap_120790 » Wed Nov 14, 2007 10:05 am Have they ever engaged in actual sex, similar to what was shown in a scene in EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Wed Nov 14, 2007 10:07 am No, not that we know of. (do you mean the masturbation scene in EoE) However, they might have, they just don;t show it in their behaviour.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Wed Nov 14, 2007 10:30 am Yes, they have. Matt Greenfield said Asuka was pregnant at the end of EoE, and that's what kimochi warui meant. So yes.

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Wed Nov 14, 2007 11:42 am Shiro wrote: Matt Greenfield is the antichrist.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Nov 14, 2007 12:25 pm i haven't looked at that thread in awhile.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 14, 2007 2:14 pm ....OH SHI--! You casted the Stardust-chan summon spell, didn't ya? [Image: Headbash icon.jpg] They did NOT have sex! That linked thread is simply speculating What if they did , seeing as in the actual series: 1) Asuka wanted SOMETHING from Shinji in Episode 9, God only knows what (The individual jury that should compose of each person's POV is still out on that one.) See these: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=684 http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3435 2) That quick scene of Asuka laying atop Shinji, both naked, along with the sex sketch is during Pre-Instrumentality, implying Instrumentality=sex due to the fact your not just sharing somebody's body, but their very soul and mind. (Kin~key!) 3) In the Final Scene, Asuka only just returned that night, having kicked down her gravemarker and lying down next to the crazy-from-isolation Shinji. No chance of them getting it on then. http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2270 Stupid Internet Rumors...Be Gone! *casts Ofuda on teh eviliness*

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Nov 14, 2007 2:51 pm Shiro wrote: Yes, they have. Matt Greenfield said Asuka was pregnant at the end of EoE, and that's what kimochi warui meant. So yes.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Nov 14, 2007 3:04 pm Yes, they have. Matt Greenfield said Asuka was pregnant at the end of EoE, and that's what kimochi warui meant. So yes.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 14, 2007 4:25 pm One of the things EvaOtaku's FAQ is on the money with: "It's impossible for souls to combine during Third Impact." or some such wording. btw, I've seen a Simpsons parody of that if it helps. ^^; Oh, and I was rambling on about the aforementioned thing (Tiffany Grant said that) on the chat yesterday. Since Ornette has our discussions on the IRC logged, prehaps he could copy/pasta what I said about that? (I'm blanking out ATM. )

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Nov 14, 2007 4:41 pm This bit? [code:1](14:11:44) SSD: It makes me sick=Kimochi warui. I feel sick=kimochi warui. as if none of you knew hehe (14:12:06) SSD: I think its interesing how people think that DC bath scene and the final scene could have a connection (14:12:09) EvaUnitOmega: haha (14:12:17) SSD: and to /some/ extent I think thats true (14:12:21) SSD: eg (14:12:29) SSD: Asuka feeling sick at having to become one with everything (14:12:35) SSD: such as her EoE line of (14:12:44) SSD: "But if it's with you I'd rather die!" (14:12:56) Ornette: the first time I learned that kimochi warui could be "I feel sick" that's what I thought of (14:12:58) SSD: implying she doesn't want to be one with everybody's souls and stuff (14:13:08) SSD: the 22DC Bath scene you mean? (14:13:13) SSD: for the final scene? (14:13:30) Ornette: the final scene (14:13:33) SSD: which makes sense despite Tines'/others thinking Asuka has a deathwish at the end (14:13:46) SSD: which is bullshit since she couldn't return if that was the case due to Destrudo (14:13:53) SSD: ...however you spell that (14:13:54) SSD: lol (14:14:00) SSD: @ Ornette: yeah (14:14:05) SSD: I think it's a combo of things (14:14:10) Ornette: definitely (14:14:33) Ornette: there are many ways of looking at any one thing in evangelion (14:14:33) Fuyutsuki: and also: cocks (14:14:36) SSD: 1) Not wanting Instrumentality to have happened because of her will to live on (14:15:11) SSD: 2) Thinking Shinji is pathetic for his crying/acting pathetic in the P3PI (have the acyromn wrong) sequence (14:15:36) SSD: 3) Possibly feeling disgusted Shinji knows she doesn't care about her being fine with SFAiBL (14:15:46) EvaUnitOmega: evengelion (14:15:50) SSD: (The Miyamura Interview is LIES I tell you!) (14:15:55) EvaUnitOmega: evangelion (14:15:55) Fuyutsuki: and also: cocks (14:16:07) EvaUnitOmega: Hmm... (14:16:23) SSD: 4) Disgust at herself for needing him & having "been kind to [him]" like he wanted (14:16:30) SSD: That's what I think was going on there (14:16:31) SSD: whee (14:16:36) SSD: lottsa stuff (14:16:42) EvaUnitOmega: wow, that's a lot of disgust (14:16:46) SSD: lol yup (14:16:57) SSD: I mean yeah I could be off with a few things (14:17:08) SSD: but based on what I know about Asuka that's what makes sense to me (14:17:13) SSD: Also with Shinji going nuts (14:17:34) SSD: 1) He was obviously upset that people didn't returned when they could have/he wanted them to (14:17:46) SSD: 2) I think the lyrics in EYED have some merit (14:17:59) ***EvaUnitOmega is reminded he never did rework EvAftermath (14:18:47) jonlin: foreshadowing perhaps?[/code:1]

[]:             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Wed Nov 14, 2007 5:08 pm V wrote: Yes, they have. Matt Greenfield said Asuka was pregnant at the end of EoE, and that's what kimochi warui meant. So yes.

Though I thought I had another point that's cut off from there? ....Meh, I don't remember. btw, check this topic about something important please: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=135681#135681 http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=135684#135684 kthxbai. /slight Off-topic @ Sachi: 'cause...they're both....bitches? (And what floats in water? ....Wood? ....More witches!)

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Wed Nov 14, 2007 9:11 pm Unless you count that little scene from EoE, then no.
